description: A twilight scene in a formal European garden with tall, geometrically trimmed hedgerows and round topiary trees lining a wide central path. Classical white marble statues stand on pedestals along the walkway. A few small figures are visible -- a woman in white seated on a bench at left, and a solitary man in dark clothing reading at right. The sky is a warm golden-orange with swirling clouds, contrasting with the deep dark silhouettes of the hedges and trees. An arched garden alcove with a fountain or niche is visible at the far end of the path.
